feature_title: Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Registration Gate (KH-18)

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Registration Gate (KH-18)

## Document Status
- Last updated: 2026-03-02
- Feature: Registration open/closed toggle
- Scope: Deferred — not adopting
- Implementation state: Deferred

## Origin

Upstream: `chevron7locked/kima-hub` v1.5.0 → v1.6.0, item KH-18.

## What the Upstream Change Does

Added a simple `registrationOpen` boolean toggle (default closed) to administratively enable/disable new user registration.

## Deferral Reasoning

Soundspan already has an invite code system (`InviteCode` Prisma model) with:
- Configurable expiry dates
- Per-code use limits
- Revocation capability
- Usage tracking and audit log

This is strictly more powerful than a simple boolean toggle. No functional gap to address.

## Revisit Criteria

- N/A — existing system is a superset of this feature
